# aimpactscanner.com

> AImpactScanner is a free AI search visibility analysis tool. It scans websites against 18 AI readiness factors and 9 SEO foundation factors to show exactly how AI search engines like ChatGPT, Claude, and Perplexity see your site. Built for solopreneurs and small businesses who need to understand their AI visibility without enterprise pricing.

## What AImpactScanner Does

- Scans any website for AI search visibility in 60 seconds
- Scores against 27 factors (18 AI readiness + 9 SEO foundation)
- Uses the MASTERY-AI Framework v3.1.1 (8 pillars, 27 factors)
- Generates a prioritised action plan to improve AI visibility
- Free tier available with no signup required
- Full reports from $9.95/month

## Who It's For

- Solopreneurs checking if AI recommends their business
- Freelancers who want to appear in AI search results
- Small agencies assessing client AI visibility
- Anyone wondering "does ChatGPT know I exist?"

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://aimpactscanner.com/): Free AI search visibility scanner
- [Pricing](https://aimpactscanner.com/pricing): Free, Growth ($9.95/mo), and Pro plans

## Part of AI Search Mastery

AImpactScanner is one of two tools in the AI Search Mastery suite. The other is LLM.txt Mastery, which generates and validates llms.txt files. Together they diagnose and fix AI visibility gaps.

- AI Search Mastery: https://aisearchmastery.com
- LLM.txt Mastery: https://llmtxtmastery.com
